summary: TWO_COLUMN: 6 circles on top with indices 1..6; ordered pick highlights 3 in sequence with RED order labels 1, 2, 3. RIGHT column reveals 7-step derivation via always_redraw as ValueTracker step_tr increments, ending with C(6,3) = 20. Phase 2 Transforms the order labels through all 3! = 6 orderings of {1, 3, 5}.
